calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-05-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S.Vantree, S. Wong #11288.
Petitioner BETSABE LANDERO LEIVA aka BETSABE CENAC DE LANDERO was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing. The petitioner did not have any form of identification to show as proof of residency in San Francisco. The Court accepts petitioner's friend, GLENDA FIDELINA TRIGUEROS, statement as true and correct that the petitioner does in fact reside in the city of San Francisco.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to BETSABE REYES LANDERO.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
